news.title: Largecaps over midcaps, banks over PSUs: V Srivatsa reveals where smart money is heading
news.description: India's market outlook is positive, driven by cooling geopolitical tensions and falling crude oil prices, according to UTI AMC's V Srivatsa. news.title: Federal Bank among 6 stocks that hit 52-week highs, rally up to 15% in a month
news.description: Six BSE200 stocks, including Federal Bank and Bharat Forge, hit fresh 52-week highs amid a strong market rally, reflecting bullish momentum, rising investor confidence, and sustained buying interest.

news.title: Bitcoin's dominance rises to 58%; remains the most-held crypto asset across Indian cities: Report
news.description: Bitcoin’s dominance in the global crypto market rose to 58.2% in H1 2026, while it remained the most-held digital asset across Indian cities on CoinDCX. news.title: Foreign inflows in Asian bonds surge to three-month high in May
news.description: In May, Asian bonds observed a significant surge in foreign investments, marking the highest inflows in three months. news.title: Dollar hits 13-month high as rate-hike bets, stock rout boost demand
news.description: The US dollar has hit a 13-month peak, fueled by a selloff in tech stocks and growing expectations for interest rate hikes from the Federal Reserve. news.title: Further Sanctions on the Cuban Regime's Revenue Generation Network
news.description: Today, the Department of State is designating five entities and one individual to further the Trump Administration's comprehensive push to end the Cuban regime's malign activities, both in Cuba and across our hemisphere.

news.title: Sold shares, gold or property? Here's how you can legally claim capital gains tax exemption of up to ₹10 crore
news.description: Selling assets like shares, mutual funds, gold, or property triggers capital gains tax. Section 54F of the Income Tax Act offers exemptions if long-term profits are reinvested into residential property. Details here.

news.title: Gold price today drops big. Will gold rate crash continue this week?
